inferential_position: estimate effect sizes with image-clustered or paired confidence intervals
report the approved meaningful effects as interpretation thresholds
do not claim guaranteed power to detect a five-percentage-point RQ1 difference
describe null findings as inconclusive when confidence intervals include scientifically meaningful effects
retain every system failure in accounting and sensitivity analyses
selection_basis: Chosen before primary output inspection after reviewing the versioned pre-data sensitivity calculation.
approval_source: project lead selection in the Codex task
